without_pythia160m.note: Pythia-160M is a leverage point (kappa=0.251 vs cluster at 0.7-0.9)

architecture_independence.note: Mamba achieves ~0.23 lower logPPL than Pythia at same kappa (better h(x))

key_findings: kappa_top1K from W_U alone predicts log(CE) with r=-0.539 (p=0.026) across 17 models and 9 architectures
Excluding LFM2.5 outlier (novel architecture with poor context modeling): r=-0.727, R2=0.528
Fixed-V (V=50K, Pythia+Mamba): r=-0.902 for kappa_top1K, r=-0.923 for kappa_bar
CAVEAT: Fixed-V r=-0.902 is leverage-dependent on Pythia-160M (without it: r=-0.064 for kappa_top1K)
kappa_bar is more robust to leverage: r=-0.535 without Pythia-160M
Architecture independence: F-test p=0.071 — Transformer and SSM share the same law (not significant at 5%)
W_U geometry is necessary but not sufficient: explains ~53% of PPL variance, missing 47% is h(x) quality
Partial correlation controlling for model size: r=-0.564, p=0.023 (NOT a size proxy)
